security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:8765 ws://127.0.0.1:* http://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Hardware watchdog UI for AI workloads on Windows
bundle.longDescription: AT-Field is an always-on hardware watchdog for AI workloads on Windows. This tray app gives you a live dashboard over the watchdog service: signal sparklines, rule verdicts, recent events, and a one-click pause toggle.
